final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-cover
Asset type: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) feed cover, vertical format
Primary request: bubble milk tea (pearl milk tea) styled for summer refreshment aesthetic
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal surface with soft pink gradient or pastel backdrop, subtle summer elements like soft shadows or blurred greenery hints
Subject: tall clear glass of bubble milk tea with visible tapioca pearls, condensation droplets on glass, creamy layered gradient from tea to milk
Style/medium: lifestyle product photography, soft editorial, feminine aesthetic
Composition/framing: top-down or 45-degree angle, centered composition, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight, soft diffused lighting, airy and refreshing summer vibe
Color palette: dominant soft pink + cream white + warm brown tea tones + subtle pastel accents
Materials/textures: glossy glass surface, creamy milk texture, chewy tapioca pearls, soft bokeh background
Constraints: must convey "夏日清凉感" summer coolness and "粉色少女风" pink girly aesthetic
Avoid: dark moody lighting, cluttered background, artificial neon colors, deformed glass shape, plastic-looking pearls
